description: Unified LLM Monitoring Dashboard - SGLang + vLLM Performance + vLLM Query Statistics

targets.expr: sum by (instance) (rate(sglang_per_stage_req_latency_seconds_sum{instance=~"$sgl_instance", stage="prefill_waiting", model_name=~"$sgl_model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (instance) (rate(sglang_per_stage_req_latency_seconds_count{instance=~"$sgl_instance", stage="prefill_waiting", model_name=~"$sgl_model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.description: End-to-End latency of requests, showing average and key percentiles over time.
panels.title: E2E Latency over Time

panels.description: 99th percentile of End-to-End request latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: E2E Latency (P99)

panels.description: 90th percentile of End-to-End request latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: E2E Latency (P90)

panels.description: Average End-to-End request latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: E2E Latency (Avg)

panels.description: 50th percentile (median) of End-to-End request latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: E2E Latency (P50)

panels.description: Time to first token (TTFT) latency, showing average and key percentiles over time.
panels.title: TTFT Over Time

panels.description: 99th percentile of Time To First Token latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: TTFT (P99)

panels.description: 90th percentile of Time To First Token latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: TTFT (P90)

panels.description: Average Time To First Token latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: TTFT (Avg)

panels.description: 50th percentile (median) of Time To First Token latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: TTFT (P50)

panels.description: Iteration latency, or average time taken to generate a single output token, with percentiles.
panels.title: ITL (Time Per Output Token) Over Time

panels.description: 90th percentile of Iteration Latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: ITL (P90)

panels.description: 99th percentile of Iteration Latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: ITL (P99)

panels.description: Average Iteration Latency (time per output token) over the selected time range.
panels.title: ITL (Avg)

panels.description: 50th percentile (median) of Iteration Latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: ITL (P50)

panels.description: Rate of tokens processed per second, including prompt and generation phases.
panels.title: TPS (Tokens Per Second) Over Time

list.label: Rush Hours Only
list.name: rush_hours
list.query: false : All hours, true : Rush hours

title: LLM All-in-One Dashboard
